title: Pet Import Guide: Australia
description: Complete guide to importing your dog or cat to Australia. Import requirements, quarantine, breed restrictions, and step-by-step process.
name: Australia
overview: Importing a pet to Australia is strict. One of the biggest factors is the mandatory quarantine requirement. Here's what you need to know.

import_requirements.microchip: Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before or on same day as rabies vaccination
import_requirements.rabies_titre_test: Required for: Groups 3, 4, 5, 6 (all except Groups 1 and 2)
import_requirements.quarantine: Mandatory. varies days. Facility: Mickleham Post Entry Quarantine Facility
import_requirements.import_permit: Required. Must be obtained BEFORE travel. Permit specifies conditions for import.
import_requirements.health_certificate: Government-issued veterinary health certificate (country-specific format). Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Import requirements for Australia
sections.body:
**Microchip:** Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before or on same day as rabies vaccination

**Rabies Vaccination:** Required

**Rabies Titre Test:** Required for: Groups 3, 4, 5, 6 (all except Groups 1 and 2)

**Quarantine:** Mandatory. varies days. Facility: Mickleham Post Entry Quarantine Facility

**Import Permit:** Required. Must be obtained BEFORE travel. Permit specifies conditions for import.

**Health Certificate:** Government-issued veterinary health certificate (country-specific format). Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Breed restrictions in Australia
sections.body: Governed by: No federal breed ban for imports. State-level legislation.

sections.heading: Routes to Australia
sections.body:
We have detailed guides for the following routes:

- [Hong Kong to Australia](/routes/hong-kong-to-australia/)
- [Singapore to Australia](/routes/singapore-to-australia/)
- [South Africa to Australia](/routes/south-africa-to-australia/)
- [United Arab Emirates to Australia](/routes/united-arab-emirates-to-australia/)
- [United Kingdom to Australia](/routes/united-kingdom-to-australia/)
- [United States to Australia](/routes/united-states-to-australia/)

faqs.question: What vaccinations does my pet need to enter Australia?
faqs.answer: At minimum, a rabies vaccination is required. Required Your pet must also be microchipped before vaccination.

faqs.question: Is there quarantine in Australia?
faqs.answer: Mandatory. varies days. Facility: Mickleham Post Entry Quarantine Facility

faqs.question: Which airlines fly pets to Australia?
faqs.answer: Multiple airlines serve pet cargo to Australia. Check our route-specific guides for airline details on your particular origin-destination pair.
